question: Give the name of the author who wrote the book titled Pride and Prejudice.
sql: SELECT Author.Name FROM Author JOIN Author_Book ON Author.idAuthor = Author_Book.Author JOIN Book ON Author_Book.ISBN = Book.ISBN WHERE Book.Title = 'Pride and Prejudice';

back_translation.intent: 获取特定书籍的作者姓名

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，SQL描述准确反映了原始问题的需求：通过Book表的Title过滤条件找到对应书籍，然后获取其作者姓名。涉及的Author、Author_Book、Book三张表关联关系合理，且未包含无关的聚合、分组、排序或限制操作。
